zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Dunham於1318年1月8日出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Rychert Dunham23歲，母親Beneditcia Folsgamble20歲。他於大約1344年與Elizabeth de Stafford在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1409年在他的家鄉享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Dunham于1318年1月8日出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Rychert Dunham23岁，母亲Beneditcia Folsgamble20岁。他于大约1344年与Elizabeth de Stafford在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1409年在他的家乡享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dunham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Dunham (Norfolk, Nottinghamshire, Cheshire). Most are named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + hām ‘homestead’. A place in Lincolnshire now known as Dunholme appears in the Domesday Book as Duneham and this too serves as a source of the surname; here the first element is probably the Old English personal name Dunna. Dunham is often difficult to tell apart from Downham .
History: John Dunham (1590–1668) was a Puritan linen weaver who came to Plymouth, MA, via Leiden, the Netherlands, in 1633. He had many prominent descendants.

variants.name: Downham
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Downham in Cambridgeshire, Essex, Norfolk, Suffolk, and Lancashire, and perhaps also from Downham, Northumberland, and Downholme, North Yorkshire, though no evidence has been found for these. The names from Lancashire and Northumberland arise from Old English dūn, dative plural dūnum ‘(at) the hills’, while the others come from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Dunham was born on 8 January 1318, in Devon, England, his father, Rychert Dunham, was 23 and his mother, Beneditcia Folsgamble, was 20. He married Elizabeth de Stafford about 1344, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1409, in his hometown, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Dunham est né le 8 janvier 1318, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Rychert Dunham, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Beneditcia Folsgamble, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Stafford environ 1344, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1409, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Dunham am 8. Januar 1318 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rychert Dunham 23 und seine Mutter Beneditcia Folsgamble 20. Er hat um 1344 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1409 im Alter von 91 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Dunham è nato il il 8 gennaio 1318 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Rychert Dunham, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Beneditcia Folsgamble, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Stafford circa 1344, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1409, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Dunhamが1318年1月8日にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Rychert Dunhamは23歳，母Beneditcia Folsgambleは20歳であった。約1344年にイギリスイギリスデボンでElizabeth de Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1409年に故郷で91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Dunham(이)가 1318년 1월 8일 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rychert Dunham(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Beneditcia Folsgamble(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Elizabeth de Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1409년 그의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Dunham nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1318, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Rychert Dunham, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Beneditcia Folsgamble, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Stafford aproximadamente 1344, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1409, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Dunham родился 8 января 1318 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Rychert Dunham было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Beneditcia Folsgamble, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Stafford около 1344 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1409 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Dunham nació el 8 de enero de 1318, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Rychert Dunham, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Beneditcia Folsgamble, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Stafford aproximadamente 1344, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1409, en su pueblo, a la edad de 91 años.
